channel.title: Frontion News - Global Geopolitics Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Holds Situation Room Meeting on Iran Ceasefire Deal
item.description: US President Trump met with top aides to make a final determination on extending the ceasefire with Iran, but the meeting concluded without clarity. Iran insists it is not negotiating on its nuclear program while the US demands Iran never possess nuclear weapons.

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN Adds Israel and Russia to Sexual Violence Blacklist
item.description: Israel has been placed on a UN blacklist for sexual violence in warzones for the first time, with 31 verified cases against Palestinians. Russia was also blacklisted for sexual violence against prisoners and civilians in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Hegseth Reassures Asia Allies on US Commitment Despite Iran War
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told the Shangri-La Dialogue that the US is not turning its back on Asia while fulfilling global obligations, calling for allies to spend 3.5% of GDP on defense while avoiding needless confrontation with China.

item.title: 🇨🇩 Ebola Death Rate at 30-50% as WHO Chief Arrives in DRC
item.description: WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus arrived in Democratic Republic of Congo and called for ceasefire among armed groups to tackle an Ebola outbreak with a huge mortality rate of 30-50%.

item.title: 🇨🇦🇨🇳 Canada Strengthens Chinese Trade Ties Amid US Trade Rifts
item.description: Canada is seeking economic diversification and strengthening trade ties with China amid growing trade tensions with the United States, as Alberta separatists gain momentum in what could be Canadas biggest unity crisis in decades.

item.title: 🛰️ Pentagon Accelerates Aircraft Tracking From Orbit With $4B SpaceX Deal
item.description: The Pentagon has accelerated its plans to track aircraft from orbit with a new $4 billion SpaceX deal, enhancing military surveillance capabilities.

item.title: 🌏 US Seeks Stable Equilibrium Against China Hegemony, Hegseth Says
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth outlined a strategy seeking a stable equilibrium against Chinese hegemony in the Indo-Pacific region during the Shangri-La Dialogue.

item.title: 🇻🇳 Vietnam's To Lam Stresses Balance at Shangri-La Amid Rising Pressure
item.description: Vietnam's President To Lam called for more dialogue to resolve tensions in the region during his keynote speech at the Shangri-La Dialogue defense summit.

item.title: 🇦🇺 MQ-28 Ghost Bat Now Flying Over Pacific From US Navy Base
item.description: The MQ-28 Ghost Bat drone is now operating over the Pacific from a US Navy base, marking a significant expansion of American unmanned combat capabilities in the region.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Gripen Fighters to Arrive in 2027 With Long-Range Meteor Missiles
item.description: Ukraine's Gripen fighters are set to arrive in 2027, with claims that long-range Meteor missiles will be included in the package.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Deploys First Permanent Troops to Lithuania
item.description: Germany has deployed its first permanent troops to Lithuania, marking a historic shift in German military posture and NATO's eastern flank defense.

item.title: 🇷🇼 Rwanda-Russia Nuclear Deal Underscores Africa's Shifting Power Balance
item.description: Rwanda has signed a nuclear cooperation deal with Russia, highlighting Africa's shifting power dynamics as nations diversify partnerships beyond traditional Western allies.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Russian Drone Hits Romanian Residential Block, NATO Condemns
item.description: A Russian drone struck a residential block in Romania after likely being hit by Ukrainian air defenses, drawing condemnation from NATO and the EU.

item.title: 🇮🇱 WhatsApp Messages Undermine Netanyahu's Pick for Mossad Chief
item.description: WhatsApp messages have emerged that undermine the alibi of Netanyahu's nominee for Mossad chief, raising questions about the appointment.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: China is constructing launch pads near its nuclear missile silos, raising concerns about its nuclear weapons posture and potential first-strike capabilities.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump's ICE Blitz Cost 668,000 Jobs, Creating Chilling Effect
item.description: Trump's immigration enforcement blitz has cost an estimated 668,000 jobs and created a chilling effect among US firms concerned about workforce stability.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Ex-California Mayor Eileen Wang Pleads Guilty to Acting as China Agent
item.description: Former California Mayor Eileen Wang has pleaded guilty to acting as an unregistered agent of China, highlighting ongoing foreign influence concerns.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Polish President Threatens to Strip Zelenskyy of State Honour
item.description: Poland's president has threatened to strip Ukraine's Zelenskyy of a top state honour after Ukraine renamed an army unit after fighters who killed Poles during World War II.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Losses in Ukraine Almost Triple in One Year
item.description: Russia's rate of losses in Ukraine has almost tripled over the past year, while territorially Russia remains at a standstill in 2026 according to ground war assessments.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU to Release Billions in Frozen Funds for Hungary Amid Magyar Reforms
item.description: The EU has agreed to release billions in frozen funds for Hungary following reforms under new leader Peter Magyar, who called it a historic breakthrough.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Deepens Lebanon Invasion Despite Ceasefire
item.description: Israel has pushed deeper into Lebanon just days after its prime minister ordered 70 percent of Gaza to be occupied, raising concerns about regional escalation.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India's Modi Efforts to Isolate Pakistan Backfired
item.description: Pakistan finds itself in a diplomatic sweet spot as Indian PM Modi's efforts to isolate the country have backfired, with analysts blaming Indian missteps.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil Prosecutors Hail Court Ruling to Preserve Fordlandia
item.description: Brazilian prosecutors have hailed a landmark court ruling to preserve Fordlandia, the historic site left to decay, protecting it from further deterioration.

item.title: 🏛️ Pope Leo XIV Makes Historic Apology for Vatican Role in Slavery
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has made a historic apology for the Vatican's role in legitimizing slavery, marking a significant moment in the Church's reckoning with its past.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Fighter Jets Strike Village in South Lebanon
item.description: Video shows the moment Israeli fighter jets struck a residential building in Ain Qana village in southern Lebanon amid ongoing regional tensions.
